goal: Fix the Related Links card thumbnail overlapping/poking out of its hero box on returning users' devices (reported via screenshot on www.meowtarot.com Daily result)
root_cause: The Related Links panel redesign (5331287, 2026-06-24) ADDED .related-links__thumb {width:48px;height:72px;overflow:hidden} (pre-redesign reading.css had 0 thumb rules). But the CSS cache-bust string stayed ?v=20260623r (set 2026-06-23, commit 91c4af8) and was never bumped. reading.js loads unversioned (fresh markup) while reading.css?v=20260623r is long-cached, so returning devices render the NEW thumb markup against the OLD cached CSS that lacks the 48x72 + overflow:hidden clamp -> thumbnail renders unclamped and overflows the box. Live CSS itself is correct (verified real live DOM: thumb 48x72, overflow:hidden, hero 98px, no top/bottom overflow; visual screenshot clean).
fix: Bumped the CSS cache-bust ?v=20260623r -> ?v=20260625a across all HTML (canonical root + www mirror + ios public) via perl in-place. No CSS/JS logic change — pure cache invalidation so every device re-fetches the current correct reading.css (and all other stale-since-6/23 CSS).
verified: grep: 0 files remain on ?v=20260623r; all on ?v=20260625a. Live www.meowtarot.com real reading DOM measured + screenshotted before the bump = already correct (the bump just delivers it to cached devices).
